chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4353 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 09.02.2026. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rabia Saqib, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh alongwith DSP (Legal-II) Raza Mian on behalf of the CPO, Karachi. ------ No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Under such circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
